rulings.Case Title: JOHN R. LEONARD et al VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Requests For Admissions And Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, September 14, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation to provide further responses to plaintiffs¿ requests for admission and form interrogatories was continued by the court to give the parties additional time to meet and confer. If all issues are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on September 13 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the RFA¿s and corresponding form interrogatories that remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9am on September 14. = (220/HEK)
